source.query: WITH game_age_ratings AS ( SELECT g.id AS game_id, g.name AS game_name, rating_id FROM games_analytics_silver.games g LATERAL VIEW explode(g.age_ratings) AS rating_id ) SELECT md5(CONCAT(CAST(gar.game_id AS STRING), '_', CAST(gar.rating_id AS STRING))) AS id, gar.game_id, gar.game_name, aro.name AS rating_organization, arc.rating AS rating_category, ar.synopsis, g.total_rating, g.total_rating_count FROM game_age_ratings gar JOIN games_analytics_silver.age_ratings ar ON ar.id = gar.rating_id LEFT JOIN games_analytics_silver.age_rating_organizations aro ON aro.id = ar.organization LEFT JOIN games_analytics_silver.age_rating_categories arc ON arc.id = ar.rating_category JOIN games_analytics_silver.games g ON g.id = gar.game_id ORDER BY gar.game_name, aro.name
